title: Energy Systems Truth Stack
summary: Energy Systems connects physics, infrastructure, markets, and governance through the question of how power is generated, moved, stored, and paid for.
starterPack: Start with conservation of energy, grid balancing, and system constraints.
Use IEA, AEMO, and serious transition analysts before hot takes.
Keep technology claims tied to infrastructure, economics, and deployment reality.

tiers.title: First principles
tiers.description: The rules that shape every energy system.

items.name: Energy transforms rather than disappears
items.description: Every system is governed by conservation and conversion losses.

items.name: Grids must balance in real time
items.description: Supply, demand, frequency, and stability are coupled.
